en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. OF DAVID.O LORD, my heart is not lifted up; my eyes are not raised too high; I do not occupy myself with things too great and too marvelous for me.
zh: 耶和華啊！我的心不驕傲， 我的眼不自高； 重大和超過我能力的事，我都不敢作。

en: But I have calmed and quieted my soul, like a weaned child with its mother; like a weaned child is my soul within me.
zh: 我的心平靜安穩， 像斷過奶的孩子躺在他母親的懷中， 我的心在我裡面真像斷過奶的孩子。

en: O Israel, hope in the LORD from this time forth and forevermore.
zh: 以色列啊！你要仰望耶和華， 從現在直到永遠。
